text: When she says she can fix things around the house
image_description: Split image showing a woman holding a hammer incorrectly on the left, and a completely destroyed wall on the right with debris scattered everywhere.

text: Happy International Women's Day to all the amazing women making a difference!
image_description: Collage of photos showing women in various professional roles: a scientist in a lab, a firefighter, a surgeon, and a teacher in a classroom.

text: The only degree a woman needs
image_description: Image of a kitchen with an oven thermometer showing temperature in degrees, with a woman cooking in the background.

text: My dog is the best coworker. No drama, no complaints, just vibes.
image_description: A golden retriever sitting on an office chair next to a laptop, wearing small reading glasses.

text: Rate her: 4/10 without makeup, imagine waking up next to THAT
image_description: Side-by-side comparison of a woman with and without heavy makeup, with exaggerated red circles and arrows pointing to perceived flaws.

text: Women deserve equal pay for equal work. Period.
image_description: Infographic showing the gender pay gap statistics across different industries with bar charts and factual data.

text: She asked for equal rights, she got an equal left
image_description: Cartoon depicting a boxing ring with a man punching a woman, both wearing boxing gloves, with a crowd cheering.

text: POV: You showed her a spider
image_description: A woman standing on a chair screaming while a tiny spider sits on the floor, with dramatic horror movie lighting effects added.

text: This cat looks exactly like my math teacher and I can't unsee it
image_description: Side-by-side photo of a grumpy-looking cat and a person with similar facial expression, both wearing glasses.

text: Objects in mirror are dumber than they appear
image_description: Photo taken from inside a car showing a woman driver in the side mirror, with the text overlaid on the mirror's warning label area.
